title: A Feast On The Train | Back Exercise in Hindi | Class 6
description:
Few things reveal character faster than how people behave around food — and Sharad Joshi's sharp, humorous Hindi story *A Feast on the Train* turns a simple railway journey into a masterclass in human greed, social pretence, and comic irony. Prescribed in the Class 6 English curriculum, this story uses the cramped setting of an Indian train compartment to expose how hunger and ego collide in hilariously awkward ways. If you've ever shared a train journey with strangers and a packed tiffin, Joshi's razor-edged observation will feel uncomfortably, brilliantly familiar.

A Feast On The Train Roots and Wings Literature Reader Back Exercise
